body.u: As I look back over the years of my life, I think back when I was at school at the age of fourteen when we had to make a disitiondecision what we were going to do when we leave school. I can remember what kind of disitiondecision I made, it was at first I was going to stay on then I decided that I would leave I wouldn’t often do this sort of thing, but in the end I did make up my mind and it was, that I was going to leave.

When the day same when I was going to leave I was, quite worried because I hadn’t got a job in hand. Well when I did leave I stayed at home and I can remember my mother telling me to go out and get a job but I knew it wasn’t so easy to go out and just get on my mother would go on all day and night she kept on because my father had not long died and I had three brothers and two sisters and they were all younger than me, that’s why my mother kept on because she was working only part time who wasn’t much money to keep six children.

Soon I had got myself a job working in a factory I didn’t like it much but it was something, I was earning just a little but more than my mother and every penny that I had went to my mother for keeping us all.

Later I became married and it was a very happy marriage my husband earned a quite a bit and I still {illegible?} the job I started with when I left school. Quite a bit later we had children which was one girl and one boy.
My life as a child wasn’t all that good that’s why I had children, so that they could lead a better life than I did.

Well over the years my life was getting a little bit better until my husband died that wasn’t long till I had to retire and looking over the years my life I don’t know why I ever moaned in the first place.
